No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or schedule supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly addresses 'An Epidemic of Mental Illness' and includes 'mental health discussion' (Week 7), directly aligning with Target 3.4 to promote mental health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university elective, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also focuses on developing reading, oral, critical thinking, and presentation skills (Target 4.4).
evidence: enhance students’ reading and oral fluency
sharpened their oral skills to confidently express opinions
developed their abilities to write summaries, reflections and responses
